title: Drum Becomes Sakura Kingdom
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on drum becomes sakura kingdom, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Drum Becomes Sakura Kingdom. Kureha fires Hiriluk’s final miracle into the snow, sending Chopper off beneath cherry blossoms and a new flag. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: We don't know where he came from,

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: But he said he was looking for "Blackbeard,"

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: The same pirate that attacked our country.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: But when we told him blackbeard had already left this country...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then let me ask you one more thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Has a pirate wearing a straw-hat come here by any chance?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TSK TSK

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We said we've never heard of him,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And that's when he handed us this wanted poster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If he happens to come to this island,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please tell him I'll be waiting in Alabasta for 10 days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That'll be all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait! What's your name!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Oh that's right, I almost forgot.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: The name's ace.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Tell him that if Luffy comes here.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: TSK TSK...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Someone catch that man! He didn't pay for his meal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Crap! Be sure to pass on the message!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see... well, I don't think there was a need to tell him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh? Why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Because those pirates are heading towards Alabasta next.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I've got a hunch about why that is...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I get the feeling we've met somewhere before.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I-it must be your imagination, I'm sure of it!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I may not understand why you're travelling with those pirates but I'm sure you have your reasons...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: You've grown up to be a wonderful lady...!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Dr. Kureha... What're you staring so intently at that poster for?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Do you know of GOL "D." BOGER...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You mean gold Roger? Well yeah, who doesn't know about him?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: ...so is that what the people call him these days?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: seems my Reindeer has gone off with a very dangerous man indeed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It seems the will of "D,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Aha ha! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The full moon is out,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And the cherry blossoms are in Bloom! What a night!

summary: This part highlights drum becomes sakura kingdom and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
